title: Thermal PDF & WhatsApp Session Persistence Update
summary: This update implements high-fidelity 88mm thermal PDF receipt layouts to match the visual preview, introduces auto-created Supabase Storage backups for WhatsApp persistence on Hugging Face, and resolves country code selection issues in the cart.
highlights: High-Fidelity Thermal PDFs: Perfect 88mm paper width layout with font, color, and divider parity to on-screen previews.
WhatsApp Connection Persistence: Auto-creates a storage bucket and backs up active sessions on Supabase for zero-disconnect restarts on Hugging Face.
Cart Country Code Fix: Country prefix picker combines dial code (e.g. Ireland +353) with national phone inputs automatically on checkout.
Performance Optimization: Zero-cost database sync rate-limiting, CRM customer details auto-linking, and PWA reliability updates.
